meta.title: About | {{name}}
meta.description: Backend Developer with legacy system migration experience, business analysis, and multi-platform work at GOLINE GLOBAL and RIKAI TECHNOLOGY.

title: About me
intro: I am a Backend Developer who enjoys turning real problems into well-structured products with reliable data and a complete user experience.

portrait.title: I do more than write code—I shape how products work.
portrait.body: My experience spans Java/Spring Boot, C#/.NET and PostgreSQL, as well as React, cloud video, payments, and operational business systems.

education.title: Education
education.body: IT foundation in object-oriented programming, databases, and web development. Alongside coursework, I gained practical experience through backend internships and personal projects such as LearnOva Online Learning Platform.

direction.title: Career direction
direction.body: Grow as a Backend Developer with strengths in system migration, business analysis, and API integration. Short term: contribute to legacy-to-.NET/Java modernization projects. Long term: become an engineer who understands both business flows and system architecture deeply.

strengths.title: Strengths
strengths.description: Strengths shaped by migration work and internships — not generic self-descriptions.

legacy.title: Reading legacy source code
legacy.body: Can trace flows in BHT-BASIC, JSP, and VB.NET source to understand branching logic and server integration points before writing new code.

business.title: Business flow analysis
business.body: Cross-check BA documents, legacy screens, and source logic to define inputs/outputs, permissions, and edge cases before migration.

multitech.title: Working across technologies
multitech.body: Switch between Android, VB.NET, Java/JSP, C#/.NET, PostgreSQL, and Spring Boot depending on project scope.

verification.title: Data and logic verification
verification.body: Compare query results, exported Excel files, and error/popup behavior between old and new systems to catch discrepancies early.

learning.title: Learning new tech quickly
learning.body: Self-learn HLS streaming, AWS CloudFront, PayOS webhooks, and new stacks when projects or personal work require them.

migration.title: Preserving business correctness in migration
migration.body: Prioritize behavioral parity and output accuracy over syntax conversion — especially for Excel reports and Handy device flows.

workStyle.title: Work style
workStyle.body: Understand the problem and business flow first, then code. Document old/new logic differences, update technical docs, and collaborate on post-migration testing.

interests.title: Professional interests
interests.body: Migration architecture, legacy code reading, API design, database mapping, and building full-stack products with real payment and streaming flows.

study.title: IT & programming foundation
study.body: Studied programming, databases, web development, and completed coursework and personal projects.

goline.title: GOLINE GLOBAL — Backend Developer DEV
goline.body: Contributed to Handy Terminal System Migration and Legacy JSP to C# WMS Migration: legacy source reading, business analysis, feature conversion support, and data verification.

rikai.title: RIKAI TECHNOLOGY — Backend Developer DEV
rikai.body: Backend internship with Java/Spring Boot: project structure, API development, database work, and technical documentation.

personal.title: Personal projects
personal.body: Built LearnOva Online Learning Platform and this Developer Journey portfolio to practice full-stack, HLS, payments, and cloud deployment.
